name: Deoxyspergualin
description: Deoxyspergualin has been used in trials studying the treatment of Lupus Nephritis, Chronic Rejection, and Diabetes Mellitus, Type 1.

interactions.name: Natalizumab
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Deoxyspergualin is combined with Natalizumab.
